scripts.codegen: python3 -c "import yaml, json; print(json.dumps(yaml.safe_load(open('./openapi.yaml'))))" > ./.openapi.codegen.json && orval --config ./orval.config.ts && python3 -c "path = '../api-zod/src/index.ts'; lines = open(path).readlines(); open(path, 'w').writelines([line for line in lines if 'generated/types' not in line])" && rm -f ./.openapi.codegen.json
